title: ASAFA and World Bioenergy Association Forge Strategic Partnership to Advance Sustainable Aviation Fuel Adoption in Asia
content: Asia Sustainable Aviation Fuel Association (ASAFA) is pleased to announce a new strategic partnership with the World Bioenergy Association (WBA), a globally recognized authority in promoting the sustainable use of bioenergy. This collaboration marks a pivotal step forward in accelerating the deployment and adoption of Sustainable Aviation Fuels (SAF) and broader bioenergy solutions across the Asia-Pacific region. By combining WBAâ€™s global network and technical leadership in bioenergy with ASAFAâ€™s regional expertise and stakeholder engagement, this partnership aims to significantly scale SAF adoption and foster innovation across Asiaâ€™s aviation ecosystem.
author: Analysts Account
